user.title: KR Finance Kit
user.description:
Everything fits on one page. Each field is optional — leave blank to disable that feature.

When an **OpenDart key** and **KR tickers** are both provided, the same tickers drive both price sensors and disclosure binary_sensors automatically — no need to type them twice.

Get a free OpenDart key at opendart.fss.or.kr → API Key request.

data_description.opendart_api_key: Leave blank to disable disclosure monitoring; price sensors still work
data_description.kr_tickers: e.g. 005930, 000660 — 6-digit = KOSPI; add .KQ for KOSDAQ. When an OpenDart key is set, the same codes drive disclosure binary_sensors too

error.invalid_api_key: OpenDart key is not valid. Verify it at opendart.fss.or.kr.

init.title: KR Finance Kit options
init.description: Edit values entered at setup. OpenDart key: get one at opendart.fss.or.kr (API Key request).

data_description.kr_tickers: e.g. 005930, 035720.KQ — also drives disclosures when an OpenDart key is set
